name: Netacea
description: Netacea delivers bot management via a server-side machine-learning engine that detects credential stuffing, scalping, account takeover and card cracking without adding client-side JavaScript. It provides APIs, connectors and dashboards for

seo.title: Netacea — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Netacea: Netacea delivers bot management via a server-side machine-learning engine that detects credential stuffing, scalping, account takeover and card crackin

when_to_use: Server-side bot detection without client-side JavaScript
Credential stuffing blocking for login and checkout APIs
Scalping prevention for high-demand ticketing and retail
Card cracking detection for payment processor endpoints
API abuse prevention via behavior-based ML scoring

pros: Server-side detection avoids client-side JS weight
Good coverage for scalping and card cracking
Works well in front of APIs and mobile
Reduces attack surface on the client
cons: Detection can lag client-side solutions initially
Less of a turnkey SaaS self-serve path
review.verdict: A strong choice when client-side JS is off-limits, otherwise client-side bot platforms often detect faster.
review.best_for: API-first and mobile-first businesses that cannot inject client-side JS for bot detection.
review.not_for: Classic web retailers happy with client-side-based bot managers like DataDome or Kasada.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
